error_signature: OAuth Redirect URL is without https
title: Google OAuth Redirect URL not using HTTPS
symptom: The OAuth Redirect URL is displayed without HTTPS, causing issues with Google authentication. Users are unable to add credentials due to this misconfiguration.
not_this_if: OAuth Redirect URL is correctly configured with HTTPS
root_cause: The OAuth Redirect URL must be configured correctly to match the expected format by Google. If it shows a local IP address or lacks HTTPS, Google will reject the request, leading to authentication failures.
fix_steps: Open the .env file in your n8n installation directory.
Add or update the line: N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL=https://your-domain.com/ (replace with your actual domain)
Run 'docker compose down' in your terminal.
Run 'docker compose up -d' to restart the n8n instance.
agent_instruction: Update the N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL in the .env file to use HTTPS and restart n8n.
